exercises.title: Create and Serve an S3 Object
exercises.description: Upload a file, generate a presigned URL, and fetch it without credentials.
exercises.expected_outcome: The object is accessible for a limited time through the signed URL.

exercises.title: Test an IAM Policy
exercises.description: Simulate whether a role can perform a specific cloud action.
exercises.expected_outcome: You can predict allow or deny before deploying code.

exercises.title: Build a VPC by Hand
exercises.description: Create subnets, route tables, an internet gateway, and security groups from scratch.
exercises.expected_outcome: You end with a usable VPC and controlled network boundaries.

exercises.title: Deploy a Lambda Image Processor
exercises.description: Trigger a function on object upload and resize the image with least-privilege IAM.
exercises.expected_outcome: An uploaded image produces a resized output artifact.

exercises.title: Build a Highly Available Web App
exercises.description: Stand up a load balancer, two app instances, and a multi-AZ database tier.
exercises.expected_outcome: The app survives an AZ failure test with minimal disruption.

exercises.title: Parameterize Infrastructure as Code
exercises.description: Refactor the app setup into reusable Terraform modules for dev and prod.
exercises.expected_outcome: The same code can provision multiple environments cleanly.
